Welcome to my website!

I am an undergraduate at the University of Maryland, where I study molecular simulations with Dr. Pratyush Tiwary as part of the Department of Chemistry and Biochemistry. I have previously worked with Dr. Jeffrey Smith to develop simulations of networks of biological neurons for the National Institute of Neurological Disorders and Stroke at the National Institutes of Health.

I plan to graduate in May 2021, and then I am heading to graduate school (although I’m not sure where). For more detailed descriptions of my research projects, take a look at my CV here.

If you want to get in touch with me, feel free to send me an email.
